pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok dependency to the project to support annotation processing.
Define the Lombok version property in the POM.

src/main/java/net/petcu/store/aop/loggin.general_idea: Add wildcard import for the new custom exception hierarchy to support pattern matching in the logging aspect.
Add a guard clause to handle StoreException subclasses with specific logging before the generic development profile logging.
Implement a helper method using Java 17+ pattern matching switch to log specific details for different StoreException subclasses.
